visuals.title: Event-Driven File Processing on AWS
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Event-Driven File Processing on AWS
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Programming on AWS and Azure</text>
  
  <!-- AWS Section -->
  <rect x="80" y="60" width="100" height="60" fill="#FF9900" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="130" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    AWS Lambda
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="80" y="130" width="100" height="60" fill="#FF9900" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="130" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    S3 Buckets
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Azure Section -->
  <rect x="240" y="60" width="100" height="60" fill="#0078D4" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Azure Functions
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="240" y="130" width="100" height="60" fill="#0078D4" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Blob Storage
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connection Line -->
  <line x1="180" y1="95" x2="240" y2="95" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Programming Languages -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="230" r="25" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Python
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="160" cy="260" r="25" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="160" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node.js
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="260" cy="260" r="25" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="260" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C#
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="130" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#FF9900" opacity="0">
    AWS
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="290" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#0078D4" opacity="0">
    Azure
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="210" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Programming Languages
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
